titleStmt.title: SII 8.289: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 289. (A.R. No. 19 of 1903). ON THE INNER GOPURA IN THE SAME TEMPLE, RIGHT OF ENTRANCE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 7vatu siṁha
nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pratha maiyum putankiḻamaiyum peṟṟa makattu nāḷ vaṭakarai virutarāca
payaṅkaravaḷaṉāṭṭu meṟkkāṉāṭṭu brahma teyam tiṭṭaikuṭiyāṉa tirucciṟṟampala- caturvvedi
maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār Ūruṭait tiruttāṉtoṉṟiśvara muṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇḍeśvara
tevar tirunāmattukku melpurocappāṭināṭṭu Iṭaicciṟuvāyk kāṇiuṭaiya Iṭaicciṟuvāyu
ṭaiyāṉ Uṭaiyāṉ kuppaiāṉa taṉañciyarāyaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Ūrāṇṭāṉum Iṭaicciṟuvāyuṭaiyāṉ
vaṭukaṉ periyāṉum Ivaṉ tampi kuppaiyum Iṭaicciṟuvāyuṭaiyāṉ poṉṉaṉ kuṉṟaṉum Āka Iv
vaṉaivom nām vilaipra māṇa Icaivutiṭṭu kuṭutta paricāvatu . Ināyaṉāṟku tiruṉāmattukkāṇiyāka nā
ṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭukkiṟa nilamāvatu Inta Iṭaicciṟuvāyil Eṅkaḷ Aṅcopātik kuṭa(l)lāka nāṅkaḷ I
ṉṉāyaṉāṟku tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟukkuṭukkiṟa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai Inṉāyaṉār teva
tāṉam tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyili kiḻcciṟuvāyāṉa kalikaṭin=ta coḻamaṅkalattu Ellaikku meṟku
n teṉpāṟkellai miṉavanallūr Erikku nir pāykiṟa vāykkālukkum Ikkiḻciṟuvāyerikku nir pāy
kiṟa vāykkālukkum vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai Amaṇaṉpaṭṭu Ellaikkum kuṟukkai Ellaikkum kiḻakku
m vaṭapāṟkellai kiṭaṅkappāṭi Ellaikkum Inṉāyaṉār tevatāṉam tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟai
yili māyūrāṉa poṉparappiṉanallūr Ellaikkum teṟkum Āka Ikkuṟitta Iṉṉāṅkel
laiuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa naṉcey puncey nattam Uḷḷiṭṭa nilaṅ kuḻi muṟṟil Eṅkaḷ Aṅkṣopāti
kku Uṭa(l)lāka Inṉāyanār tevatāṉam kiḻcciṟuvāyāṉa kalikaṭin=ta coḻamaṅkalattu Ellai
uṭaṉ cera nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta Inta kiḻcciṟuvāy Ellaikku meṟkum miṉavanallūr E
rikku nir pāykiṟa vāykkālukku vaṭakkum Inta kiḻcciṟuvāy Erikku nir pāykiṟa vāykkālil
vaṭakku nokkiṉa murippukkum Itaṉ teṟku Immurippukkuner Āṟṟile viḻu Īṅkaiorumā Eṉ
ṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattu melvarampukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ikkiḻcciṟuvāyerikku
nir pāykiṟa vāykkālukkum Inta Erikaraikkum teṟkum Āka Ikkuṟitta Innāṉkellaiuḷ na
ṭuvupaṭṭa nilaṅ kuḻimuṟṟil Ivvūr Uṭaiyār Aṅkakkāṟaīśvara muṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉam kuṉṟā
ḻvārcey Enṟu per kūvappaṭṭa taṭi Oṉṟiṉāṟ kuḻi nūṟṟaṟupatum Ellainālumā Eṉṟu per kūva
ppaṭṭa taṭi muṉṟiṉāl kuḻi Irunūṟṟu Aṟupatum Inṉilattuk teṟkaṭainta puṉcey kuḻi nūṟṟu Ai
mpatum Āka naṉcey kuḻi nānūṟṟuirupatum puṉcey kuḻi nūṟṟu Aimpatum nikki Eṅkaḷutāy
Inṉāyanāṟku Āticaṇṭeśvara tevar tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta makatecan
kolāl naṉcey nilaṅ kuḻi Aiyyāyirattu Irunūṟṟu Irupattumuṉṟum puṉceynilaṅ kuḻi
muvāyirattu nānūṟṟu Irupattunālum Ivaiyiṟṟukku nīr pāyappaṭṭa vāykkāl Urimaiyum
Iṭaicciṟuvāyeriyāl nirpāya Uḷḷa Urimaiopātiyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Urimaika
ḷum Akappaṭa Innāyaṉāṟkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmili
cainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 10000 2 1000 Ikkācu paṉṉirāyiramum Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟik
kaiccela vaṟakkoṇṭamaiyil Ikkācu paṉṉirāyirattukkum Ikkoyil mutaliyār Ālālacuntarap
perumāḷukkum tevakaṉmi tiruttāntoṉṟipaṭṭaṉukkum koyiṟkaṇakkut tiruttāṉtoṉṟi
ppiriyaṉukkum maruṅkuṭaiyāṉ cilaṉ Utaiyapālaṉāna teṟaiyarāyaṉaik kiḻippuṇaiyāka niṟutti
Ikkācu paṉṉirāyiramum ne �kak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom Inta Ūru
ṭait tiruttāntonṟiīśvara muṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇḍeśvara tevar tirunāmattukku
Inta Iṭaicciṟuvāyuṭaiyān Uṭaiyāṉ kuppaiyāṉa taṉañciyarāyanum Ivaṉ tampi Ūrāṇ
ṭāṉum Iṭaicciṟuvāyuṭaiyāṉ vaṭukaṉ periyāṉum Ivaṉ tampi kuppaiyum Iṭaicciṟuvāyu
ṭaiyān poṉṉaṉ kuṉṟaṉum Āka Ivvaṉaivom
Digital edition of SII 8.289 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
